access.title: Session アクセス
access.description: この ORG でチームメイトがあなたのローカル sessions から見られる内容を選びます。
access.onboardingHint: You can change this anytime in the ORG's Sessions settings.

off.title: オフ
off.description: Session カードや replay データを共有しません。

metadata_only.title: Session カードのみ
metadata_only.description: タイトル、所有者、ブランチ、Workspaces のみ共有します。

full_replay.title: 完全 replay
full_replay.description: チームメイトが完全なイベント snapshot をリクエストできます。

access.workspacesHint: 共有できる workspace パスを選択します。少なくとも 1 つ選ぶまで何も共有されません。
access.noWorkspaces: ローカル session workspace がまだ見つかりません。
access.fullReplayWarning: 完全 replay には prompts、出力、tool calls、ファイルパスが含まれる場合があります。信頼できる ORGs でのみ有効にしてください。
access.metadataOnlyDenied: この session はメタデータのみ共有されています。完全 replay は利用できません。
access.requestPending: 所有者に session replay をリクエスト中...

members.roleChangeConfirmPromote: Give {{member}} admin rights for this ORG?
members.lastAdminError: This member is the last admin. Promote another member to admin first.

share.restrictWarning: Copies teammates already imported cannot be retracted.
share.directedEmpty: No other members to share with.
share.linkCopied: Link copied — it is shown only this once.
share.linkShownOnce: Copy this link now — it is shown only this once.
share.noOrgs: This session is not in any org's shared repo scope.
share.incomingRetryHint: Import didn't finish. The shared session may still be uploading — try again.
share.incomingError: This share link is invalid, expired, or has been revoked.

onboarding.title: Enable session sharing
onboarding.description: Choose which of your sessions this org can see. You can change this anytime.
onboarding.shareNewTitle: Only share sessions created from now on (default)
onboarding.shareNewDescription: Existing sessions stay private; re-share old ones per session.
onboarding.shareAllDescription: Sessions in the org's repo scope become visible, including past ones.
onboarding.accessOffBanner: Your sessions are not shared with this org.

invites.title: Invites
invites.adminOnly: Only ORG admins can manage invites.
invites.revokeConfirm: Revoke this invite? Links created from it stop working immediately.

leave.warning: You will stop syncing with this ORG. Imported session copies stay on this device unless you choose to remove them.
leave.removeImported: Also remove imported session copies from this device
leave.lastAdminError: You are the last admin. Transfer the admin role or delete the ORG before leaving.

workitem.replayUnavailable: This session is no longer shared
